scope: One bounded Prize Pack slice using currently accessible evidence only.

target_slice.label: Promo Number Accessible Series 1-3
target_slice.shared_question: For promo-numbered Prize Pack rows whose accessible raw pages omit a stable base set-name signal, does the combination of base name plus printed promo number across accessible Series 1-3 sources prove one corroborated series or multi-series duplication?
